title: Create: Blockzapper Memorial
description: Adds the Blockzapper Memorial block to remember the good old days of the Create mod.
body:
## Requirements
This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), and currently only supports NeoForge 1.21.1.

## Credits
- Handheld Blockzapper assets are from [the 0.3.1 version of Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create/files/3278516).
- Made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).

## Usage in Modpacks
Feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!

## Blockzapper Memorial
![Blockzapper Grave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CS8giPH1/images/8a8e3e4bdbac65cbe44b9b1b530d9d9c8157ec39.png)

## Crafting Recipe
![Fading Memory Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CS8giPH1/images/c9cd9c59fe7f308ddd7dbe0e83857e127efe1b1a.png)
![Blockzapper Memorial Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CS8giPH1/images/b8ad6b958832c536f93d3e55af1423632f5c798a.png)
